target.title: [codex] isolate config tests and remove legacy release archive
target.body:
## Summary

Isolates config CLI tests from the operator home data directory and removes the checked-in legacy `v0.6.2` macOS release archive now that the same archive and checksum exist on the GitHub release.

## Goal (Cherny pattern)
SUCCESS_CRITERION: MCPorter config CLI tests pass with isolated config/data homes and the redundant checked-in release archive is removed without losing release evidence.
VERIFY_COMMAND:    pnpm exec vitest run tests/cli-config-command.test.ts && pnpm run check
ROLLBACK_COMMAND:  git revert HEAD --no-edit
TIMEBOX:           PT2H

## Validation

- GitHub release readback for `v0.6.2` confirmed `mcporter-macos-arm64-v0.6.2.tar.gz` and `mcporter-macos-arm64-v0.6.2.tar.gz.sha256` are both uploaded release assets.
- Release asset digest for `mcporter-macos-arm64-v0.6.2.tar.gz`: `sha256:f10d87f12794933b1f0d9b793e955342905a19fdc79a89df2e18d9654f7ba9f2`.
- `pnpm exec vitest run tests/cli-config-command.test.ts` passed in a throwaway validation copy of PR head `fdd3d5fda6f199ca85e43aed07342828e7255ecf`.
- `pnpm run check` passed in the same validation copy.
- GitHub Actions CI for PR #206 passed on Ubuntu, macOS, and Windows; Socket Security checks also passed.

## Proof

Release asset readback:

```text
$ gh release view v0.6.2 --repo openclaw/mcporter --json tagName,assets,url
tagName: v0.6.2
assets:
- mcporter-macos-arm64-v0.6.2.tar.gz
  size: 22727354
  digest: sha256:f10d87f12794933b1f0d9b793e955342905a19fdc79a89df2e18d9654f7ba9f2
- mcporter-macos-arm64-v0.6.2.tar.gz.sha256
  size: 101
url: https://github.com/openclaw/mcporter/releases/tag/v0.6.2
exit: 0
```

Focused config test:

```text
$ pnpm exec vitest run tests/cli-config-command.test.ts
RUN v4.1.6 [redacted-temp-validation-copy]
PASS tests/cli-config-command.test.ts (22 tests) 56ms

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       22 passed (22)
Duration    345ms
exit: 0
```

Repository check:

```text
$ pnpm run check
> mcporter@0.11.3 check [redacted-temp-validation-copy]
> pnpm format:check && pnpm lint:oxlint && pnpm typecheck

> oxfmt --check .
Checking formatting...
All matched files use the correct format.
Finished in 267ms on 339 files using 18 threads.

> oxlint --type-aware --tsconfig tsconfig.json --report-unused-disable-directives --deny-warnings --max-warnings=0 --allow eslint/no-underscore-dangle
Found 0 warnings and 0 errors.
Finished in 663ms on 273 files with 144 rules using 18 threads.

> tsgo --project tsconfig.json --noEmit
exit: 0
```

CI log excerpt from Ubuntu check run `80806208161`:

```text
Run pnpm check
Run pnpm build
Run pnpm test
Test Files  125 passed | 1 skipped (126)
Tests       778 passed | 3 skipped (781)
Duration    30.41s
exit: 0
```

## Notes

Submitted from the `LDMB123/mcporter` fork because direct push to `openclaw/mcporter` is not permitted for this token.
